IEEE DataPort Voices
Showcase Insights Moderation Editor tools Submit

IEEE DataPort Member Voices

A curated showcase of public reflections and testimonials about IEEE DataPort, sourced from editorial review of #ieeedataport LinkedIn posts, IEEE-published member stories, and consent-based submissions.

Discover posts on LinkedIn #ieeedataport search , then add rows to data/linkedin-staging.csv with the real post URL. The pipeline merges, filters, and deploys automatically.

Pipeline status

Live data

Automated flow: CSV merge → content filter → enrich → GitHub Pages deploy. Updates when data/linkedin-staging.csv changes and the daily Action runs.

All published reflections

Featured
"It is a valuable platform for securely storing, sharing, and citing research data, and it supports open research and collaboration within the research community."
Aqsa Abu Bakar · NUST / AITeC
neutral testimonial Asia-Pacific CitationCommunityDiscoveryOpen Data
2026-07-02 View source
"A benefit of IEEE DataPort is its visibility, as it is accessible to the entire IEEE community and, through the open access option, by any interested researcher."
Francesca Meneghello · University of Padova
neutral testimonial Europe CommunityDiscoveryOpen DataReproducibility
2026-07-02 View source
"This DOI provides a permanent and an actionable source of truth for my data, making it easy for any researcher to find."
Victor Asanza · Escuela Superior Politécnica del Litoral (ESPOL)
positive testimonial Latin America CitationDiscoveryMetadataUsability
2026-07-02 View source

Curated member-engagement showcase. Only approved, consented content is published.
